title: Better World Border
description: Improves the world border to be less visible and simple
body:
A Resource Pack that makes the Minecraft world border simple and clear. It removes distracting effects and bright visuals, making the border easier to see, less overwhelming, and more accessible for all players.

![Comparison Before and After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30d88f47598a6804f82acf35c02b8e69d0b39bd8.gif)
